metadata.description: Utah 2026 black bear hunt opportunities dataset built from the official Utah DWR hunt table.
assumptionNotes: Summer black bear seasons that mention July are labeled Archery for planner usability.
Pursuit hunts are assigned the weapon value Pursuit.
Statewide permit and harvest objective rows are treated as General for planner compatibility.
Other black bear rows are treated as Limited Entry seasonal bear hunts.

records.title: Black bear
records.seasonLabel: July 18 - July 31, 2026

records.title: Black bear pursuit - resident
records.seasonLabel: Spring: Mar 28-May 25, 2026 | Summer: July 5-July 31, 2026 | Fall: Nov 2-8, 2026

records.title: Black bear - statewide permit
records.seasonLabel: Any open season on any open bear unit during the 2026 season. See 2026 Black Bear Guidebook for season dates and take methods.
